data.content:
Here's a summary of what was implemented:

### Files created/modified

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `TicketClassifier.csproj` | Added `Microsoft.ML 4.0.2` package |
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input/output data classes with `LoadColumn` attributes |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API DTOs: `TicketRequest`, `PredictionResponse`, `EvaluationResponse` |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML pipeline — text featurization + SDCA Maximum Entropy trainer |
| `Controllers/TicketsController.cs` | REST endpoints with input validation |
| `Program.cs` | Registers the classifier as a singleton |

### Endpoints

- **`POST /api/tickets/classify`** — Predicts category (`Billing`, `Technical`, `General`) with confidence scores per class
- **`GET /api/tickets/metrics`** — Returns evaluation metrics (micro/macro accuracy, log loss)

### ML Pipeline

`Subject` and `Description` are text-featurized separately, concatenated with `Priority`, normalized, then classified using **SDCA Maximum Entropy** multiclass trainer. The model trains at startup from `Data/tickets.csv`.
